hypothesis: Material-specific fine-tuning of the eSEN model on 100 ab initio strained configurations per system with a stress-weighted loss (stress terms weighted at least equal to forces) will reduce mean absolute stress error by ≥50% and cut VASP SSNEB restart iterations by ≥40% for the CsPbI3 β→γ and TiO2-B→anatase transitions while keeping the final DFT-computed energy barriers within 0.02 eV of VASP-only baselines.
